name: n8n-autopilot
description: Claude Code plugin that turns natural-language prompts into validated, deployed n8n workflows via the n8nac CLI.

plugins.name: n8n-autopilot
plugins.description: Build, validate, and deploy n8n workflows from Claude Code. CLI-only (n8nac reference 2.2.1, minimum 2.2.0; auto-installed via npx). Requires Node.js 18+ and the companion plugin `n8n-as-code@n8nac-marketplace` (Etienne Lescot) for the `n8n-architect` skill. Ships init-repo, build-workflow pipeline, deploy, pull-schemas (CLI + npm-extraction fallback), sync-credentials with --fix-workflows, inventory, data-tables, plus SessionStart hooks for staleness detection with auto-reactions and a workspace-migration diagnostic.
